name: Sidharth Ramachandran
bio: Spent the last decade leading multiple data and product teams at RTL, Citibank and Transunion. Co-authored an O'Reilly book on Natural Language Processing. Started nuefunnel because most AI-product engagements are too large to be useful — a two-person team with coding agents can do in five weeks what a ten-person consultancy used to do in six months.
